memoryArtifacts.headline: On find a grave
memoryArtifacts.description:
Daughter of Sir Ralph Lingen Mp, and Margery De Cheyne.

Isabel founded the chantry and college at Tong for her own and her husbands souls. It became the shrine church of the Vernon family of Haddon H …

zh.Market Drayton, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓
zh.Stokesay, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾斯托可賽
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Lingen於1370年出生在英國史洛普爾霍德特時，她的父親Sir Ralph Lingen III36歲，母親Margery de Cheyne25歲。她於1390年與William Ludlowe在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1446年12月6日在英國史洛普爾通享年76歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾通。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Lingen于1370年出生在英国史洛普爾霍德特时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Lingen III36岁，母亲Margery de Cheyne25岁。她于1390年与William Ludlowe在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1446年12月6日在英国史洛普爾通享年76岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾通。

nameMeanings.name: Lingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German; Dutch (Van Lingen): habitational name from Lingen on the Ems river in Lower Saxony, Westphalia, and the former East Prussia.
English (Herefordshire): habitational name from a place in Herefordshire, so named from an old British stream name, Welsh llyn ‘water’ + possibly cain ‘clear, beautiful’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Lingen was born in 1370, in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Lingen III, was 36 and her mother, Margery de Cheyne, was 25. She married William Ludlowe in 1390, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 6 December 1446, in Tong, Shropshire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Tong, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Lingen est née en 1370, à Hodnet, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Lingen III, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margery de Cheyne, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William Ludlowe en 1390, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1446, à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Lingen 1370 in Hodnet, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Lingen III 36 und ihre Mutter Margery de Cheyne 25. Sie hat 1390 in Shropshire, England William Ludlowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 6. Dezember 1446 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Tong, Shropshire, England und wurde in Tong, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Lingen è nata il nel 1370 nel Hodnet, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Lingen III, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Margery de Cheyne, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato William Ludlowe nel 1390, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 6 dicembre 1446, nel Tong, Shropshire, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Tong, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Lingenが1370年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアホードネットで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Lingen IIIは36歳，母Margery de Cheyneは25歳であった。1390年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでWilliam Ludloweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1446年12月6日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングで76歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアトングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Lingen(이)가 1370년 영국 슈럽실르 호드넷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Lingen III(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Cheyne(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 슈럽실르에서 William Ludlowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 12월 6일 영국 슈럽실르 탕에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 탕에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Lingen nasceu em 1370, em Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Lingen III, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Cheyne, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com William Ludlowe em 1390, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1446, em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Lingen родилась в 1370 г. в местности ходнет, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Lingen III было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Cheyne, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Ludlowe в 1390 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 6 декабря 1446 г. в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Lingen nació en 1370, en Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Lingen III, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margery de Cheyne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con William Ludlowe en 1390, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 6 de diciembre de 1446, en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
